vocab.meaning: sở thích đã có từ lâu đời
vocab.example: Reading has been a long-standing hobby of mine, spanning over two decades since I first picked up a comic book.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng niềm đam mê với cái gì
vocab.example: My parents helped me nurture a passion for playing the piano from a very tender age.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (thời thơ ấu)
vocab.example: I took up drawing during my formative years, and it has remained my primary creative outlet ever since.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Collecting stamps always evokes a strong sense of nostalgia, reminding me of the afternoons spent with my grandfather.

vocab.meaning: gắn bó, đi cùng ai đó (suốt thời gian dài)
vocab.example: My love for swimming has stayed with me through thick and thin, from primary school all the way to adulthood.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn qua thời gian/không bị mai một
vocab.example: Although I've tried many new activities, my interest in chess is the only one that has truly stood the test of time.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy lại niềm yêu thích cái gì
vocab.example: After a brief hiatus in high school, I managed to rekindle my interest in photography recently.

vocab.word: an integral part of one's life
vocab.meaning: một phần thiết yếu/không thể thiếu trong cuộc sống
vocab.example: Gardening has become such an integral part of my life that I can't imagine a weekend without tending to my plants.
What started as a simple way to pass the time as a kid has evolved into a sophisticated skill in woodworking.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết không hề lay chuyển/thay đổi
vocab.example: I still pursue model building with the same unwavering enthusiasm I had when I was eight years old.
